reference: An area of my gums on the left part of my mouth on the inside has been hurting for the past few days. I have tried looking, but I cannot see that area at all. It feels like there is an open cut, like a wound, and if I move my mouth around or touch my tongue to it, even just a little, it hurts quite a bit. What could that be?
text: An area of my gums on the left part of my mouth on the inside has been hurting for the past few days. I have tried looking, but I cannot see that area at all. It feels like there's an open cut, like a wound, and if I move my mouth around or touch my tongue to it, even just a little, it hurts quite a bit. What could that be?
